name: smoke_test_1xh100_10min
run_command: RUN_ID=smoke_test DATA_PATH=./data/datasets/fineweb10B_sp1024/ TOKENIZER_PATH=./data/tokenizers/fineweb_1024_bpe.model VOCAB_SIZE=1024 MAX_WALLCLOCK_SECONDS=600 VAL_LOSS_EVERY=1000 torchrun --standalone --nproc_per_node=1 train_gpt.py

name: naive_baseline_1xh100_80min
run_command: RUN_ID=naive_baseline_1xh100_80min DATA_PATH=./data/datasets/fineweb10B_sp1024/ TOKENIZER_PATH=./data/tokenizers/fineweb_1024_bpe.model VOCAB_SIZE=1024 MAX_WALLCLOCK_SECONDS=4800 VAL_LOSS_EVERY=200 torchrun --standalone --nproc_per_node=1 train_gpt.py

name: mamba_v1_loop_scan_10min
run_command: MAX_WALLCLOCK_SECONDS=600 python -m mamba.train (sequential loop scan, 400 steps @ 1503ms)

name: mamba_v2_vectorized_scan_10min
run_command: MAX_WALLCLOCK_SECONDS=600 python -m mamba.train (vectorized matmul scan, 1032 steps @ 581ms)

name: mamba_v3_dstate8_cs128_10min
run_command: SSM_STATE_DIM=8 SSM_CHUNK_SIZE=128 MAX_WALLCLOCK_SECONDS=600 python -m mamba.train (1028 steps @ 583ms)

name: mamba_80min_v1_wd6000
run_command: WARMDOWN_ITERS=6000 MATRIX_LR=0.03 SCALAR_LR=0.03 TIED_EMBED_LR=0.04 (8248 steps @ 582ms, OVER 16MB LIMIT!)

name: mamba_80min_v2_dstate8_seq2048
run_command: SSM_STATE_DIM=8 TRAIN_SEQ_LEN=2048 WARMDOWN_ITERS=8000 MATRIX_LR=0.03 (8210 steps @ 585ms, ~16.0MB borderline)

name: mamba_80min_v3_extremewd
run_command: SSM_STATE_DIM=8 TRAIN_SEQ_LEN=2048 WARMDOWN_ITERS=20000 MATRIX_LR=0.02 (8209 steps @ 585ms, 13.0MB, quant_dmg=0.004)

name: mamba_80min_v4_12layers
run_command: NUM_LAYERS=12 ATTN=9,11 SSM_STATE_DIM=8 SEQ=2048 WD=20000 LR=0.02 (6772 steps @ 709ms, 14.9MB, BEST)

name: mamba_80min_v5_13layers
run_command: NUM_LAYERS=13 ATTN=10,12 SSM_STATE_DIM=8 SEQ=2048 WD=20000 LR=0.02 (6218 steps @ 772ms, 15.7MB, worse than 12L)

name: transformer_v1_10L_seq2048
run_command: 10L SEQ=2048 WD=20000 LR=0.02 Muon=0.99 (11056 steps @ 434ms, 17.0MB OVER LIMIT, beats baseline by 0.035)

name: transformer_v2_slide64
run_command: v1 + sliding window stride=64 (free -0.021 bpb from eval, 17.0MB OVER LIMIT)

name: transformer_v3_9L
run_command: 9L (single change from v2: drop 1 layer) + slide64 (12022 steps @ 399ms, 15.4MB VALID)
